author: Horizon Customer
text:
It’s not a strict improvement over everything, but I’ve done a lot of testing and it’s a fantastic product.

After using it a bunch I noticed the following:

- On coffees where the structure is coming apart either due to being too coarse or too low ey, it’s able to integrate things such that the structure stays together and finishes well

- On coffees where it’s fresher and the finish is astringent, it can remove a lot of the astringency creating a far higher clarity finish and smoother cup

- On coffees where the finish has elements of herbal bitters, the acid integration from horizon also helps

- Coffee can be “saved” for many minutes, even an hour and still be relatively vibrant and drinkable whereas cup that is just covered would be totally gone. It’s definitely not ideal, but I can come back to coffee after periods of time that I thought weren’t really possible.
